summary: Completed testing of CAEN browsing feature (Coduri CAEN). All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages working correctly with search, filters, pagination, and navigation.

minor.issue: Slow response time (~95s) due to aggregation on 2.38M companies - expected for large dataset

issues: No direct 'Coduri CAEN' link in header - users must navigate via company page CAEN link or direct URL

backend_caen_sections: Response contains total and sections array
Each section has sectiune, denumire, codes_count
backend_caen_codes: Response contains total and codes array
Each code has cod, denumire, company_count
backend_caen_companies: Response contains caen, total, companies, top_judete
CAEN info has cod=5520 and denumire
Companies have cui, denumire, slug fields
Top judete has judet and count fields
frontend_caen_list_page: /caen page loads with title 'Coduri CAEN - Activitati economice'
Section filter buttons (A-U) present and functional
Table columns: Cod, Activitate, Sect., Firme
frontend_caen_detail_page: /caen/5520 page loads with CAEN code and title
Section info displayed: 'Sectiunea I: Hoteluri si restaurante'
Stats: '14.300 firme cu acest cod CAEN'
Top 10 judete filter chips with counts (Constanta, Brasov, Cluj, etc.)
Companies table with columns: Denumire, CUI, Locatie, Stare, Cifra Afaceri, Juridic
frontend_company_caen_link: Company page /firma/s-o-s-utilaje-co-s-r-l-37044065 has clickable CAEN link

action_items: Consider adding 'Coduri CAEN' link to header navigation for easier discovery
Consider caching CAEN codes aggregation to improve /api/caen/codes response time
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing company and CAEN data from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: CAEN browsing feature complete. Routes: /caen (list all 1332 CAEN codes with search and section filters), /caen/{cod} (list companies with that CAEN code with judet filters, search, pagination). API endpoints: /api/caen/sections, /api/caen/codes, /api/caen/code/{cod}. Company page has clickable CAEN link that navigates to /caen/{cod}. Test company CUI 37044065 (S.O.S. UTILAJE CO S.R.L.) has CAEN 5520. The /api/caen/codes endpoint aggregates counts from 2.38M companies and can be slow (~95s). No CAEN link in header navigation - users access via company page or direct URL.
